children.heading: Ambassador at Large
children.label: 1 Ambassador at Large
children.text: The term “Ambassador at Large” means the Ambassador at Large for International Religious Freedom appointed under .section 6411(b) of this title

children.heading: Annual Report
children.label: 2 Annual Report
children.text: The term “Annual Report” means the Annual Report on International Religious Freedom described in .section 6412(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate and the Committee on International Relations of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any determination made with respect to the taking of President action under paragraphs (9) through (15) of , the term includes the committees described in subparagraph (A) and, where appropriate, the Committee on Banking and Financial Services of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate.1section 6445(a) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “Presidential”.1

children.heading: Commensurate action
children.label: 4 Commensurate action
children.text: The term “commensurate action” means action taken by the President under .section 6445(b) of this title

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 5 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom established in .section 6431(a) of this title

children.heading: Country Reports on Human Rights Practices
children.label: 6 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices
children.text: The term “Country Reports on Human Rights Practices” means the annual reports required to be submitted by the Department of State to Congress under sections 2151n(d) and 2304(b) of this title.

children.heading: Executive Summary
children.label: 7 Executive Summary
children.text: The term “Executive Summary” means the Executive Summary to the Annual Report, as described in .section 6412(b)(1)(F) of this title

children.heading: Government or foreign government
children.label: 8 Government or foreign government
children.text: The term “government” or “foreign government” includes any agency or instrumentality of the government.

children.heading: Human Rights Reports
children.label: 9 Human Rights Reports
children.text: The term “Human Rights Reports” means all reports submitted by the Department of State to Congress under sections 2151n and 2304 of this title.

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 10 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given that term in .section 1001 of title 20

children.label: A
children.text: exercises significant political power and territorial control;

children.label: B
children.text: is outside the control of a sovereign government; and

children.label: C
children.text: often employs violence in pursuit of its objectives.

children.heading: Office
children.label: 12 Office
children.text: The term “Office” means the Office on International Religious Freedom established in .section 6411(a) of this title

children.heading: Particularly severe violations of religious freedom
children.label: 13 Particularly severe violations of religious freedom
A
children.text: torture or cruel, inhuman, or degrading treatment or punishment;

children.label: B
children.text: prolonged detention without charges;

children.label: C
children.text: causing the disappearance of persons by the abduction or clandestine detention of those persons; or

children.label: D
children.text: other flagrant denial of the right to life, liberty, or the security of persons.

children.heading: Special Adviser
children.label: 14 Special Adviser
children.text: The term “Special Adviser” means the Special Adviser to the President on International Religious Freedom described in .section 3021(i) of title 502See References in Text note below.2

children.heading: Special Watch List
children.label: 15 Special Watch List
children.text: The term “Special Watch List” means the Special Watch List described in .section 6442(b)(1)(A)(iii) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: assembling for peaceful religious activities such as worship, preaching, and prayer, including arbitrary registration requirements;

children.label: ii
children.text: speaking freely about one’s religious beliefs;

children.label: iii
children.text: changing one’s religious beliefs and affiliation;

children.label: iv
children.text: not professing a particular religion, or any religion;

children.label: v
children.text: possession and distribution of religious literature, including Bibles; or

children.label: vi
children.text: raising one’s children in the religious teachings and practices of one’s choice; or

children.label: B
children.text: any of the following acts if committed on account of an individual’s conscience, non-theistic views, or religious belief or practice: detention, interrogation, imposition of an onerous financial penalty, forced labor, forced mass resettlement, imprisonment, forced religious conversion, forcibly compelling non-believers or non-theists to recant their beliefs or to convert, beating, torture, mutilation, rape, enslavement, murder, and execution.
